description: Calculate the Standardized Mortality Ratio (SMR) for lung cancer in a cohort of British doctors who smoke using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Use the study population data in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\doctors_smokers.csv' and the reference rates in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\nonsmoker_rates.csv'. Save a text report containing the calculated SMR value and the total expected deaths to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\smr_report.txt'.

metadata.dataset_citation: Doll R, Hill AB. Br Med J 1956 (Reconstructed)
